name: growmax
description: Shared Claude Code skills for the Growmax team.

plugins.name: growmax-skills
plugins.description: Growmax team skills bundle. Includes github-repo-analyzer: turn any GitHub repo into a short briefing (what it is, problem, why used) plus a two-part 'safe to use?' verdict — license (can a closed-source B2B SaaS use it) and security (Trivy scan for CVEs, secrets, misconfigs).
